title: Building a Chatbot That Remembers: Leveraging MrMemory for AI-Powered Conversations
description: Discover how to create a chatbot that remembers user preferences and past conversations using MrMemory, Streamlit, and LangChain.

title: How to Add Memory to Your Python AI Agent in 3 Lines of Code
description: Learn how to add persistent, searchable memory to your Python AI agent using MrMemory's Managed Memory API.

title: Adding Persistent Memory to LangChain Agents: A Guide
description: Learn how to add persistent memory to your LangChain agents and improve their conversational capabilities.
